findings.title: Attack surface summary
findings.detail:
groups: open=0, allowlist=3
tools.elevated: disabled
hooks.webhooks: disabled
hooks.internal: disabled
browser control: enabled
trust model: personal assistant (one trusted operator boundary), not hostile multi-tenant on one shared gateway

findings.title: Feishu doc create can grant requester permissions
findings.detail: channels.feishu tools include "doc"; feishu_doc action "create" can grant document access to the trusted requesting Feishu user.
findings.remediation: Disable channels.feishu.tools.doc when not needed, and restrict tool access for untrusted prompts.

findings.title: Some configured models are below recommended tiers
findings.detail:
Smaller/older models are generally more susceptible to prompt injection and tool misuse.
- anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5 (Haiku tier (smaller model)) @ agents.defaults.model.fallbacks
findings.remediation: Use the latest, top-tier model for any bot with tools or untrusted inboxes. Avoid Haiku tiers; prefer GPT-5+ and Claude 4.5+.

findings.title: Extension plugin tools may be reachable under permissive tool policy
findings.detail:
Enabled extension plugins: feishu.
Permissive tool policy contexts:
- default
- agents.list.main
- agents.list.copy-agent
- agents.list.product-agent
- agents.list.cfo-agent
findings.remediation: Use restrictive profiles (`minimal`/`coding`) or explicit tool allowlists that exclude plugin tools for agents handling untrusted input.
